reason: All 4 acceptance criteria PASS: food_075 removed from afternoon_snack and replaced with food_031 (fruit category from catalog); total calories 1769.9 kcal is -0.60% from original 1780.5 kcal (within ±5%); no other meal slots were modified.

criterion_results.criterion: AFTERNOON_SNACK slot no longer contains food_075 (אורז בסמטי, category=grain)
criterion_results.evidence: timing_fix plan afternoon_snack items are food_056, food_057, food_031 — food_075 is absent; confirmed by direct JSON comparison of 2026-05-26_17-23-19_timing_fix.json

criterion_results.criterion: Replacement item has category in {nut_seed, fruit, dairy, vegetable} and is drawn from foods_extended.json
criterion_results.evidence: food_031 (תפוח/Apple) has category=fruit per nutrition_app/data/foods_extended.json; item exists in catalog and is not invented

criterion_results.criterion: Total plan calories stay within ±5% of original 1780.5 kcal (1691–1869 kcal)
criterion_results.evidence: New plan totals.calories_kcal = 1769.9 kcal; manual sum of all items also = 1769.9 kcal; deviation = -0.60%, well within ±5% limit

criterion_results.criterion: No other meal slots (breakfast, morning_snack, lunch, dinner) are modified
criterion_results.evidence: Direct item-level comparison of breakfast, morning_snack, lunch, dinner between iter_20 and timing_fix: all 4 slots have identical food_ids and quantities
